message:
feat(reflect): filter out internal/auto-generated session types

Add configurable session exclusion patterns to prevent cm reflect from
processing unwanted session types that waste resources.

Default exclusions:
- prompt_suggestion / prompt-suggestion (Claude Code internal)
- auto_complete / auto-complete
- inline_completion / inline-completion
- /subagents/agent-a* (Claude Code subagent sessions)

New config options:
- sessionExcludePatterns: string[] - patterns to exclude (substring match)
- sessionIncludeAll: boolean - bypass exclusions when true

Also fixes pre-existing type error: add FTS_TABLE_MISSING to
DegradedCassReason/CassDegradedReason types.

Closes #20

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -31,6 +31,16 @@ export function createTestConfig(overrides: Partial<Config> = {}): Config {
     diaryDir: "/tmp/diary",
     maxReflectorIterations: 3,
     autoReflect: false,
+    sessionExcludePatterns: [
+      "prompt_suggestion",
+      "prompt-suggestion",
+      "auto_complete",
+      "auto-complete",
+      "inline_completion",
+      "inline-completion",
+      "/subagents/agent-a",
+    ],
+    sessionIncludeAll: false,
     dedupSimilarityThreshold: 0.85,
     pruneHarmfulThreshold: 3,
     defaultDecayHalfLife: 90,
